shadcn-html v0.1.0
GitHub

Overview

Introduction Token System Setup agents.md

Components

Button Dialog Sheet Card Accordion Tabs Dropdown Toast Combobox Toggle

shadcn-html / combobox

Minimal JS

Combobox

Searchable select input using <input role="combobox"> + role="listbox" popup. Filters as you type, keyboard navigable via aria-activedescendant. Uses popover for the dropdown.

No results found.
Next.js
SvelteKit
Nuxt
Remix
Astro
No results found.
North America
Eastern (EST)
Central (CST)
Pacific (PST)
Europe
GMT (London)
CET (Berlin)
EET (Bucharest)
patterns/combobox.md

Native basis

<input role="combobox"> + role="listbox" popup. DOM focus stays on input — uses aria-activedescendant.

Structure

.comboboxwrapper, position: relative .combobox-input-groupflex row — input + chevron trigger .combobox-contentlistbox with popover, fixed position .combobox-itemoptions with hover/highlight/selected states .combobox-group-labelnon-interactive group heading .combobox-separatorvisual divider between groups .combobox-emptyshown when filter returns no results aria-disabled="true"greyed out, not selectable

Keyboard

ArrowDown/Up navigate options. Enter selects. Escape closes.

Typing filters the list. Tab closes popup and moves focus.

<div class="combobox">
  <label class="label" for="my-input">Framework</label>
  <div class="combobox-input-group">
    <input id="my-input" class="input" type="text"
           role="combobox" autocomplete="off"
           aria-expanded="false"
           aria-controls="my-listbox"
           aria-activedescendant=""
           aria-autocomplete="list"
           placeholder="Search...">
    <button class="combobox-trigger" type="button"
            tabindex="-1" aria-label="Toggle">
      <svg aria-hidden="true">...</svg>
    </button>
  </div>
  <div id="my-listbox" class="combobox-content"
       role="listbox" popover aria-label="Options">
    <div class="combobox-empty" hidden>
      No results found.
    </div>
    <!-- Grouped with labels -->
    <div class="combobox-group-label">Group A</div>
    <div role="option" id="opt-1"
         class="combobox-item"
         data-value="next" aria-selected="false">
      Next.js
    </div>
    <div class="combobox-separator"></div>
    <div class="combobox-group-label">Group B</div>
    <div role="option" id="opt-2"
         class="combobox-item"
         data-value="svelte" aria-selected="false">
      SvelteKit
    </div>
    <!-- Disabled option -->
    <div role="option" class="combobox-item"
         aria-disabled="true" aria-selected="false">
      Unavailable
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
